creator: gonzo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jason Bacon from comment #0)

Hi Jason,

Please log in using @FreeBSD.org account and post comment in this PR to confirm ownership. See [1]  for more details on how to generate or set a password for your @freebsd.org account.


[1] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/committers-guide/kerberos-ldap.html
